title: AuditEvent
description: Normalized record of a security-relevant system event. All authorization decisions, policy changes, identity lifecycle events, and emergency overrides are expressed as AuditEvent records. Field names are stable external identifiers — they must not be renamed once in production use.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record. UUID v4. Must be non-empty. Auto-generated by the Python model if not supplied.

event_type.description: Category of the event. Used for filtering and routing in the audit pipeline. Explicit enum — unknown values are rejected.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred (not the time it was written to storage). Must include timezone offset. Timezone-naive timestamps are rejected by the Python model.

subject_id.description: Stable identifier of the subject. Null for system events with no associated principal. Non-null values must be non-empty.

subject_name.description: Human-readable subject label. Null for system events.

subject_type.description: SubjectType value. Null for system events.

subject_roles.description: Roles held by the subject at the time of the event. Empty for system events or subjects without role assignments.

action.description: Action name. Stable external identifier — appears verbatim in stored records. Must be non-empty. Follows '{verb}:{domain}[:{object}]' convention for authorization_decision events.

resource_id.description: Normalized resource identifier. Null if the event is not resource-specific.

resource_type.description: ResourceType value (e.g., 'hvac', 'sensor', 'device'). Null if the event is not resource-specific.

outcome.description: Outcome for authorization_decision events. Explicit enum — unknown outcome strings are rejected. Null for non-decision event types.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the outcome. Null for non-decision events.

evaluated_by.description: Name of the policy or component that produced this decision. Null for non-decision events.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy set in effect at evaluation time. Null if the enforcement point was not configured with a policy version.

request_id.description: DecisionRequest.request_id for correlation with the request and response records. Null for events not associated with a DecisionRequest.

detail.description: Arbitrary key/value context specific to this event. For authorization_decision events: command parameters, policy context. For adapter_event: adapter id, protocol. Structure is event-type-specific and not constrained here.
